name: jobs-for-me
description: Jobs For Me — an AI-powered job search agent that learns what roles you'd actually take, finds them, assesses fit, and prepares you for interviews
help: When the user asks 'what can you do?', 'help', or similar, read the user_summary field from each skill's SKILL.md frontmatter and present them as a concise overview. Group by workflow: getting started (setup), daily use (search, assess, review, update, apply), output (board, prep), and configuration (tweak).
